## Keeping this file current
- Manually: `python scripts/update_handoff.py` refreshes the snapshot block above.
- Automatically on every commit (one-time setup): `git config core.hooksPath scripts`
  then `chmod +x scripts/pre-commit`. After that, each `git commit` regenerates the
  snapshot and includes it in the commit. The setting lives in `.git/config`, so it
  survives the "replace working tree from zip" update flow.
- The **narrative** sections (status, work-in-progress, decisions, next task) are
  hand-maintained — update them as the project changes; the snapshot only covers the
  mechanical inventory.


**Last updated:** 2026-07-20 · 141 tests passing (SQLite + Postgres).

## Project overview
- **Name:** Curriculum Coherence Layer (GitHub repo: `fishymur/Teacher-Summarizer`).
- **Product:** A model-agnostic curriculum coherence & verification layer for schools.
  Teachers upload course material; a **guarded AI tutor** answers students *from that
  material* and cites it; a **deterministic verifier** checks every reply complied
  before it reaches a student; **teacher insights** aggregate patterns without
  surveilling individuals.
- **Target users:** Teachers (author material, publish, read escalated transcripts for
  their own courses); students (use the tutor + their own transcript); admins (plumbing
  only — roles/retention/providers/audit; NO curriculum authority or student data).
- **Current stage:** MVP, deployed to production.
- **Tech stack:** Python 3.13; standard-library `http.server` web layer (no web
  framework); SQLAlchemy 2.0 ORM; Pydantic 2. Frontend is plain HTML/JS
  (`ccl/web/landing.html`, `teacher.html`, `student.html`) served by the app. Anthropic
  (Claude) for the live tutor, vision transcription, and contract drafting; a
  deterministic offline **stub** provider runs when no API key is set.
- **Hosting:** Docker image on **Render** (free instance; cold-starts after ~15 min
  idle). Source on GitHub; Render auto-deploys on push to `main`.
- **Database:** **PostgreSQL on Neon** (free tier) in production via `DATABASE_URL`;
  **SQLite** for local dev and tests. Same SQLAlchemy models run on both. Neon supports
  **pgvector** (intended store for future semantic retrieval).
- **Third-party services:** Anthropic (Claude API), Neon (Postgres), Render (hosting).
- **Production URL:** the Render service URL (e.g. `https://teacher-summarizer.onrender.com`).
- **Current priority:** teacher UX correctness/polish; then the concept/prerequisite
  graph and real embeddings retrieval.

## Repository layout (`ccl/` package)
- `contracts/` — CurriculumContract schema + lifecycle state machine.
- `validation/` — 9-rule publish validator.
- `policy/` — deterministic policy engine → PolicyDecision (modes, hint ceilings,
  allowed sources, external-source scope).
- `data/` — SQLAlchemy models (`models.py`, `tutor_models.py`, `insight_models.py`,
  `privacy_models.py`, `provider_models.py`), `repository.py` (tenant isolation),
  `services.py`, `audit.py`, `db.py` (`make_engine(url)`, `init_db`, `SchemaMeta` +
  `read_/stamp_/reset_schema_version`).
- `tutor/` — `orchestrator.py` (respond pipeline), `classifier.py`, `planner.py`,
  `verifier.py`, `injection.py`, `retrieval.py` (`KeywordRetriever`, `VectorRetriever`,
  `make_retriever`), `embeddings.py` (`LocalHashingEmbedder`, `make_embedder`).
- `providers/` — `base.py` (`GenerateRequest`/`GenerateResult`), `anthropic.py`
  (`generate`, `complete`, `transcribe_images`), `stub.py` (deterministic).
- `insights/`, `access/` (RBAC: roles, controller, workspace), `governance/`
  (provider registry), `privacy/` (retention, deletion/export), `compiler/`
  (`draft_contract`, `llm_draft_contract`), `evals/` (golden cases + harness).
- `web/` — `api.py` (`AppState` + endpoint functions), `server.py` (routing, RBAC gate,
  Basic-Auth gate, DB-url resolution), `__main__.py`, and the three HTML pages.
- Root: `demo*.py`, `run_live_gate3.py`, `Dockerfile`, `.dockerignore`,
  `requirements.txt`, `DEPLOY.md`, `README.md`, `pytest.ini`, `conftest.py`, `tests/`.

## Environment variables (all config is env-driven)
- `DATABASE_URL` — Postgres (Neon) connection string; takes priority. `postgres://` /
  `postgresql://` are normalized to the `postgresql+psycopg://` driver.
- `CCL_DB` — SQLite file path (used only when `DATABASE_URL` is unset). Default local
  file `./ccl_demo.db`. A bare path is treated as a SQLite file.
- `HOST` (default `127.0.0.1`; set `0.0.0.0` when hosted), `PORT` (Render injects it;
  falls back to `CCL_PORT` then 8000).
- `CCL_ACCESS_PASSWORD` — optional shared password; when set, the whole app requires
  HTTP Basic Auth (any username). `GET /healthz` stays open for health checks.
- `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` — enables the live model + vision; absent = offline stub.
- `CCL_TUTOR_MODEL` (default `claude-sonnet-5`), `CCL_RETRIEVAL` (`keyword` default |
  `vector`), `CCL_EMBED` (`local` default), `CCL_TEST_DB` (point the test suite at
  Postgres for parity).

## HTTP surface (server.py)
- Pages (GET): `/` → landing, `/teacher`, `/student`, `/healthz` (open).
- API (POST unless noted): `/api/state` (GET), `/api/student/state` (GET),
  `/api/course`, `/api/material`, `/api/material/delete`, `/api/upload`,
  `/api/compile`, `/api/publish`, `/api/publish-course`, `/api/tutor`,
  `/api/simulate`, `/api/insights`. Writes are RBAC-gated by permission (`_REQUIRED`).

## Current status — working (141 tests pass on SQLite and Postgres)
- Contract core, tutor runtime, insights; RBAC; retention/deletion; provider registry;
  prompt-injection battery.
- **Material-first teacher Studio:** compact **Class** dropdown + **＋ New class**;
  separate **Materials** tab (list with **Remove**, add via **Title (required)** + one
  of file **or** paste, with a **confirm** step before a file is ingested); class
  selection is shared across tabs.
- **Simplified publish:** one **Publish for students** button auto-drafts the contract
  from the material; an optional **Teaching preferences** panel (help level, allow full
  solutions, one never-allowed method); a **source-scope dropdown** — "answer only on
  class content" / "use some outside sources" / "open to all outside sources" — that
  maps to `source_policy.external_sources` (`disabled`/`teacher_approved_only`/
  `enabled`) and genuinely drives generation + citation strictness.
- **Tutor** infers the topic from published material (no "current unit" field). Student
  work-photo path uses vision with the live model.
- **Uploads:** text + text-PDFs read offline; **photos and scanned PDFs are transcribed
  by the vision model** (needs `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`; scanned PDFs rendered via PyMuPDF).
- **Persistence:** file/Postgres DBs persist across restarts; seeded once; a
  dialect-neutral `schema_meta` version guard resets a persistent DB only on a version
  mismatch. Tests stay on in-memory SQLite.
- **Postgres migration complete;** Neon in production. **Access gate** via
  `CCL_ACCESS_PASSWORD`.

## Work in progress / not yet built
- Concept/prerequisite graph + department surface.
- Real embeddings retrieval: `VectorRetriever` + `make_retriever` seam exists and works
  offline via `LocalHashingEmbedder`, but true semantic search needs an embeddings
  **provider** (pgvector is the intended store). This is the main deferred piece.

## Known issues / gotchas
- **Deploying code does not migrate existing DB tables.** The app only *creates* tables
  that don't exist; it never alters existing ones. A schema change to an existing column
  needs a manual SQL step in the Neon SQL Editor. (Resolved example: a leftover NOT NULL
  `subject` column on `course` blocked class creation; fixed with
  `ALTER TABLE course DROP COLUMN subject;`.)
- Render free instance cold-starts after idle (~1st request slow). Basic Auth must run
  over HTTPS (Render provides it) — never plain http.
- Postgres enforces foreign keys (SQLite didn't): create parent rows before children,
  and referenced users must exist. Fixtures seed the specific ids the tests use.

## Important architectural decisions
- Rules live in the **deterministic verifier**, never only in prompts → models are
  swappable without changing what the contract permits.
- Provider **adapter pattern**: real Anthropic adapter when a key is present, else a
  deterministic stub. Same pattern for retrieval (keyword default, vector seam) and
  embeddings (local offline default).
- **Storage-agnostic invariants**: SQLite for tests/local, Postgres for prod, one set of
  models. Dialect-neutral schema-version guard.
- **Privacy floor:** never surface a pattern below 5 distinct students; no verbatim
  single-student quotes; raw transcripts gated + audited. **Separation of duties** across
  teacher/student/admin.
- **Material-first UX:** the contract is auto-drafted from uploaded material; the teacher
  only sets a few optional preferences.

## Constraints
- Free-tier budget (Render free instance; Neon 0.5 GB, scale-to-zero). Live model +
  vision cost real money per call (only active when `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` is set).
- Child-safety and privacy requirements above. HTTPS required for the auth gate.

## Local setup (fresh session)
```bash
git clone https://github.com/fishymur/Teacher-Summarizer.git
cd Teacher-Summarizer
python3 -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate   # Python 3.13
pip install -r requirements.txt pytest
python -m pytest            # expect 141 passed (in-memory SQLite)
python -m ccl.web           # serves on http://localhost:8000 (SQLite file ./ccl_demo.db)
```
Run the suite against Postgres for dialect parity:
`CCL_TEST_DB=postgresql+psycopg://USER:PASS@HOST/DB python -m pytest`

## Deploy (Render + Neon)
See `DEPLOY.md`. In short: push to GitHub → Render builds the `Dockerfile` → set env
vars `HOST=0.0.0.0`, `DATABASE_URL=<Neon string>`, `CCL_ACCESS_PASSWORD=<random>`, and
optionally `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`. Render injects `PORT`.

## Recommended next step
Pick one: (a) build the **concept/prerequisite graph + department surface**, or (b) wire
a real **embeddings provider** onto the existing `VectorRetriever`/pgvector seam. Both are
scoped in "Work in progress" above.
